violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Bottle attached to dispenser was observed empty during time of inspection. Chemical was replenished during time of inspection. Quaternary ammonium chemical was observed in excess of 500 ppm post change of chemical bottle. PIC informed to manually mix chemical until properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Stirring utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Ice machine chute frame was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

1. Quaternary ammonium chemical dispenser was not dispensing chemical at proper concentration. 2. Stagnant water observed at bottom shelving of 2 door beverage cooler. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be re-grouted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
